title: Seven Heavenly Fated Disciples
content:
Tian Yun Xing (
Planet Tian Yun
) is where the 
Heavenly Fate Sect
 resides and everyone who lives on this planet is well aware that 
All Seer
 (Tian Yun Zi) has his own special team of disciples. There are seven of them to match the seven colors of the rainbow (aka Tian Yun Qi Zi). All Seer has his Seven Heavenly Fated Disciples while 
Ling Tianhou
 (leader of 
Da Lou Sword Sect
) has his 
12 Sword Disciples
.

These titles are not just for status and appearances.

Benefits:

- As one of these titled disciples, one can obtain a country of their own on Planet Tian Yun or on any of the nearby planets within Planet Tian Yun's vicinity to cultivate. 

- In addition, when one of these disciples is about to break through to wen ding (
ascendant
) stage of their cultivation, All Seer will step in to assist them, increasing one's chances of achieving ascendant stage by 30%. 

- Each one of these disciples also get a chance to receive a complete version of a low-ranked celestial spell/technique from All Seer if they can hold onto their position for 1,000 years. 

So every 1,000 years, there is a competition within each division to maintain/replace one of the core members. If there is an empty slot or if anyone is interested in competing for that slot, they will do so during this competition.

When Wang Lin first arrived at Planet Tian Yun and asked to enter the Heavenly Fate Sect, Tian Yun Zi assigned him to the purple division as an honorary disciple, recalling how he saw Wang Lin's talent when he was comprehending the life and death domain on 
Planet Suzaku
. 

Wang Lin was not aware that this competition was coming up when he just arrived at the sect. And 
Zhao Xingsha
 (from the purple division) saw him as a threat to that titled position.

Divisions/Members
[
]

Red Division

Orange Division

Yellow Division

- 
Kun Penzi

Green Division

Cyan Division

Blue Division

Violet Division

- 
Chen Tao
 (previous title holder, regained title after Sun Yun disappeared)

- 
Sun Yun
 (previous title holder, mentioned in Donghua episode 104)
